subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code:
function Count
  (M    : Map;
   Test :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean) return Big_Natural

documentation.description:
Count the number of mappings on which the input Test function returns
True. Count can only be used with Test functions which return the same
value on equivalent keys.

subprograms.name: Create

documentation.description:
Return a new map with New_Length associations. Each association is
created by calling New_Key and New_Item.

subprograms.name: Eq_Compatible
subprograms.code:
function Eq_Compatible
  (M     : Map;
   Value :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Big_Integer) return Boolean

documentation.description: Value returns the same value on equivalent keys

subprograms.name: Eq_Compatible
subprograms.code:
function Eq_Compatible
  (M    : Map;
   Test :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean) return Boolean

documentation.description: Test returns the same value on equivalent keys

subprograms.name: Filter
subprograms.code:
function Filter
  (M    : Map;
   Test :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean) return Map

documentation.description:
Return a new map with all mappings of M on which the input Test function
returns True. Filter can only be used with Test functions which return
the same value on equivalent keys.

subprograms.name: Lemma_Count_All
subprograms.code:
procedure Lemma_Count_All
  (M    : Map;
   Test :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean)

parameters.name: M
parameters.description:
Additional lemma:
Count returns Length (M) if Test returns True on all elements of M.

parameters.name: Test
parameters.description:
Additional lemma:
Count returns Length (M) if Test returns True on all elements of M.

subprograms.name: Lemma_Count_Eq
subprograms.code:
procedure Lemma_Count_Eq
  (M1, M2 : Map;
   Test   :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean)

documentation.description:
Automatically instantiated lemma:
Count returns the same value on maps containing the same mappings.

subprograms.name: Lemma_Count_None
subprograms.code:
procedure Lemma_Count_None
  (M    : Map;
   Test :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Boolean)

parameters.name: M
parameters.description:
Additional lemma:
Count returns 0 if Test returns False on all elements of M.

parameters.name: Test
parameters.description:
Additional lemma:
Count returns 0 if Test returns False on all elements of M.

subprograms.name: Sum
subprograms.code:
function Sum
  (M     : Map;
   Value :
     not null access function
       (K : Key_Type; E : Element_Type) return Big_Integer)
   return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Sum the result of the Value function on all mappings of M. Sum can only
be used with Value functions which return the same value on equivalent
keys.

subprograms.name: Transform

documentation.description:
Return a new map containing a mapping per key in M. The new associations
are obtained using Transform_Key and Transform_Item. Transform_Key
shall not collapse keys together.

subprograms.name: Transform_Element
subprograms.code:
function Transform_Element
  (M              : Map;
   Transform_Item :
     not null access function (E : Element_Type) return Element_Type)
   return Map

documentation.description:
Return a new map containing a mapping per key in M. The new associations
are obtained using Transform_Item on the associated elements.
